pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly downloading to these paths from sentinel-cogs.s3.us-west-2.amazonaws.com
task description explicitly instructing to save to this path, and setup_task.sh creating the snap_exports directory
task description explicitly instructing to save to this path, and setup_task.sh creating the snap_exports directory
task description instructing to delete the original bands so only the 2 new ones remain, and export_result.sh parsing XML for band count
task description requiring 'uint8' type and export_result.sh explicitly parsing <data_type> text to lowercase

privileged_info_summary: Verified that real Sentinel-2 satellite data (Red and NIR bands, specifically scene 31TGM_20201223_0) from AWS Open Data is downloaded to /home/ga/snap_data/. The task explicitly requires creating 2 bands with a 'uint8' data type and exporting them as BEAM-DIMAP and GeoTIFF formats to /home/ga/snap_exports/dl_input_8bit.dim and /home/ga/snap_exports/dl_input_8bit.tif respectively, which is consistent with the export_result.sh evaluation script that extracts <data_type> and <Spectral_Band_Info> lengths from any .dim files in the export directories.
